ARBITRATOR PHILIP ALLAN SEGAL APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-21-2012 THROUGH MAR-21-2013.
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 302, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS CHOICE HOTELS INTERNATIONAL, INC, COMFORT INN & SUITES MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES FOR REQUEST FOR DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS ARE HEREBY ORDERED TO SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS' FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET NO. ONE, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 24, 2013. PLAINTIFFS ARE FURTHER ORDERED TO SERVE VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS' DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET NO. ONE, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, AND TO PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 24, 2013. PLAINTIFFS ARE ORDERED TO PAY SANCTIONS TO DEFENDANTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $498.00 ON OR BEFORE JANUARY 24, 2013. ORDER SIGNED. PRO TEM JUDGE: ANTHONY SCHOENBERG, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED. =302/JPT
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-14-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
ORDER AND STIPULATION FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Responses Tor Request For Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Paul Yee, Law Offices of Brian McClellan, 510.457.9923, appearing for the Defendant;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS CHOICE HOTELS INTERNATIONAL, INC, COMFORT INN & SUITES Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories And Responses For Request For Documents And For Sanctions is GRANTED. Plaintiffs are hereby ordered to serve verified responses to Defendants' Form Interrogatories, Set No. One, without objections, on or before January 24, 2013. Plaintiffs are further ordered to serve verified responses to Defendants' Demand for production of Documents, Set No. One, without objections, and to produce responsive documents on or before January 24, 2013. Plaintiffs are ordered to pay sanctions to Defendants in the amount of $498.00 on or before January 24, 2013. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Anthony Schoenberg, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported. =302/JPT
